S.FORM: == Patikolen ko sowal no ina ako pirakat a onto == Taywan, roma a sowal Formosa, oya mataelifay to ko 400 mihecaan no likisi a cecay fangcalay kanatal, 'aloman ko papotalay misamawmaway sapicalapan mikowan sapipalekapotan to sowal manga'ay ko pikowan to Taywan o sanay. Anini sa "Patikolen ko sowal no ina ako pirakat a onto" 37 to ko mihecaan, tikoen no mita misahiraterateng to no Ngayngay piliyang to misatekeday mikowan a to'ek a cisawarakay demak, o sapidamaaw to sowal no niyah macodahay tireng a sasowalen kimad. Sarakatay sowal no kitakit a onto ​I 1895 miheca, satapangan no Dipong micalap, o kararimaan nipicalap a mikowan itini sapisalofaw to sakasasowal, o Sotoku no kyuden no Dipong mipatireng i kasaniyaro' to "sowal no kitakit a pitilidan", "sowal no kitakit a pinanaman" sanay pipasifana'an, mangalay minanam ko tamdaw no Taywan to sowal no kitakit (Dipong a sowal) saan. ​​Tangasa i 1937 miheca, o sapihakitiyaan to no Dipong kitakit "kapolongan harateng no finawlan" macelak to ko "Nihon-ka onto", o halafinay to ko citodongay pasi tosaay sowal satao', misa'icel micikeroh to kitakit a sowal onto, orasaka caay ka halafin ko picikeroh, maleko to ko pahecian no todong. Dotocen misa'osi, pikowanan no Dipong salongan ira ko 57% a taywan tamdaw ko mafana'ay somowal to no Dipong a sowal, polong no Taywan ira ko rafas no 9000 laloma'an ko "misano Dipongay to sowal a loma'", 'alomanay finawlan minokay tayni loma', ono niyah to a sowal ko nisowalan. Malisema ko sowal no ina ​I 1949 miheca, mapidah to ko komintang i Congko itiya i, ikor milaliw tayni i Taywan, mala o nicalapay mikowan to Taywan, sa'ayaw mafiyol ko pipasowal pisano Dipong a sowal ko finawlan no Taywan, kalokesan i, o picikeroh no komintang a sifo pamatiyaen to no Dipong picalap mikowan a satao' ko "pasowal to no kitakit sowal onto" (kowaping), padoedo palasawad to sowal no ina a sowal no kitakit a satao'. ​​Congko komintang mipalowad to piepec to Taywan, itini i no komintang a picalap a mikowan, milongoc to pitilidan to pihamon micowat to no kitakit a sowal onto, macalap awid to 30% ko pinanam, pasifana' to kaemangay to sowal, tilid, saminco'is, likisi no congko a kamok. ​​​O sakaranikayaw minanam no kaemangay pasowal to no kowaping, saka pakinali sato ko pitilidan mifo'ot pipasowal no kaemangay to sowal no ina a misano kowaping sowal to sapitefoc, tinako: seti'en, fakingen, pakatomirengen, pacalay to paya no Waco (palawacoen) a paya to "misano kowaping kako" sanay calay a tilid. ​​​​Saki malasingsiay ato finawlan toya haw i, mipatireng k sifo to pinanaman to kowaping a sowal, patangic to finawlan papisano kowaping, saan palacecay to sowal, sakanga'ay kasasowalen sato, ano itira i ikakong, paratohay ato 'oripan to romi'ai'ad mifa'ot misano Payrang, Ngangay, Yincuminco a sowal. Malasawad to ko piepecan kacelakan no hana ​I 1987 miheca 7 folad 15 romi'ad palasawadan to piepec, adihayay kasaonto no syakay matiya sa o naikoran no 'orad masadan to ko tefo' a madadoedo, nanoyaan sato mipangiha to sifo palowad to sowal no Ngayngay ato romaroma finacadan ngiha a sowal. ​​I 1987 miheca 10 folad 25 romi'ad, o hakasi no Taywan daykako ci Qiu Rongju ato sinpunkisya ato romaroma hakasi kapolongan patireng a cassi "kasenangan Ngayngay" sanay. Sarakatay a cassi pa'ayawan "Atekakay a'ilocan no wawa, fa'elohay felih a likisi" sanay ko patosokan, oya kakeridan o citodongay no Ngayngay, Wenhuapo o kakeridan ci Li Yongde ko patodongan tamdaw no cassi. ​​​Laloma'an ira ko piparatoh, painiay sowal, kasasowalan kahira no nicikerohan to foladan no cassi, nanay pakayni tonini a cassi, mapalal ko misa'osiay ko salo'afang no Ngayngay tamdaw, mapadama pakatama to maholacay 50 miheca no Ngayngay. ​​​​"kasenangan Ngayngay" cassi mitahidang to nai katedalan piepec sarakat midemak to lisin no "Imin" sanay lisin i Taypisien itiya, ira ko 4 romi'ad 3 ko dadaya masolot ko 10 'ofad tamdaw to mikihatiyaay; padoedo toya mihecaan 11 folad, midemak ko Sincu Imin pipaypayan to 200 mihecaan no Ngayngay a lisin. O kadadoedo tadamaanay lisin no Ngayngay, ira ko rafas 30 a sakapot malacecayay faloco' to sapipatirengaw to "Ngayngay salongoc yofayof", palowad to "Patikoen ko sowal no ina ako pirakat a onto", mitahidang to polong no kitakitay finawlan no Ngayngay mirakat i lalan itiya. Macodahay ko katomireng pasadak to letoh a ngiha ​I 1988 miheca 12 folad 28 romi'ad, polong no kasaniyaro' no kitakit a Ngayngay masa'opo itira i Kuofo piharatengan, misa'osi to "Pita'ong ci Sun Yat-senan a tilid" toya romi'ad, ikor o 'alomanay tamdaw cifaloco' to haratengan patelien ko fodawan marar ni Sun Yat-sen pateli i paliding, ta misitapang a mirakat itiya. ​​Oya mikihatiyaay alacitamokis sa a romakat, mi'ang'ang: "Ano ma'orip iho ci Sun Yat-sen i, caay ka nga'ay ira pasowal to no Ngayngay a sowal." Mikapot k kacodah no laha no 'alomanay, nanoyaan sa pasayra i Lifayin ato Sincenyin ko rakat, pafeli to piliyang a tilid i citodongay no sifo. ​​​Ira ko toloay salongoc no mirakatay, nanay o palasawad no sifo to misatekeday sakowan a piepecan i, patireng to no Ngayngay a sowak ato roma a sowal no finacadan i salaloma'an no kitakit a malalen ko fa'elohay sowal no palengawan: ​​​​1.Ranikayen kao sowal no Ngayngay a tilifi ato pakafana' to maomahay ratoh to romi'ami'ad 2.Salofen ko "sarikec patoh i tilifi" saka 20 liyad to patolas telek a kasadama to sowal a pakayraan. 3.Patireng to kasairaira no fa'elohay a sowal satao'. ​Maherek koni a demak, talifahalan sa, o adihayay palowadan a demak, mikihatiyaay padadoedo sato "makihar" no sifo, talacowan malasawaday to ko piepecan no Taywan, ono komintang ho kitakit a salo'afang misiyop ho i kakarayan no sera no Taywan, kikay no komintang ira ho padoedo a dademak. ​​Harateng sa pasowal ci Qiu Rongju hakasi, "polong no kitakit a ngayngay rafasay to 200 ko mirakatay faso, pasi'amis mikihatiya mirarakat, i'ayaw no romi'ad ira to ko imeng milalang to sakaeca mikihatiya, patayraen aca i pinengnengan to pinanowan, pali'ayaw pasowal to o rarepeteng saan. saka o mamikinapatay ko faloco' ako itiya, patala to saliyaw no 228 piliyangan madoka' a cimapatay. Pilongoc to salongoc no sowal, o kapolongan nisafaloco'an to sakalalenaw ​O sakalaheci i patikolen ko sowal no ina onto pirarakat o nai Ngayngay tamdaw ko pipa'orip to sakatadamaan no Ngayngay a ponka, milongoc to sakacitari'ang ato sakatadamaan sa mikihatiya, patikolen ko sowal no ina onto pirarakat i o Ngayngay ko sa'ayaw to patosokan onto nai o Ngayngay. ​​Onini a onto caay ka dengan o Ngayngay tamdaw a sowal ko makari'angay maepec no misatekeday mikowan, toya to'ek midayhiway tonini a sera no Taywan to malecaday maepecay finawlan no Taywan ato yincumin a finacadan. Itiya toyaan, misarocod to ko yincuminco pasi sifo a milongoc to sakadama no niyah a sowal. ​​​Nai 2000 mihecaan itiya, macakat ko Mincintang sifo micikeroh to saki kasafinacadan palowad to sowal a onto, pacomoden ko sowal no ina nanamen itini i pitilidan. I 2018 miheca 12 folad 25 romi'ad, mikowan ci Tsai Ing-wen i, mahayda ko "O rikec to sakacemahad no sowal no kitakit" pakayni i sarikec mapadama ko ponka ato sowal no Taywan, malaheci palalen to so'elinay tadasowal. Mikawitay: ci Wu Shengxian (Sin Taywan hepin kikingkay matayalay) ==== Mifalicay: ci Masao Nikar ====
S.PHON: == patiko~uɾən ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u ina ako~u pirakat a o~unto~u == tajwan, ro~uma a so~uwaɾ fo~urmo~usa, o~uja mataəɾifaj to~u ko~u *** miħəʦaan no~u ɾikisi a ʦəʦaj faŋʦaɾaj kanataɾ, ʡaɾo~uman ko~u papo~utaɾaj misamawmawaj sapiʦaɾapan miko~uwan sapipaɾəkapo~utan to~u so~uwaɾ maŋaʡaj ko~u piko~uwan to~u tajwan o~u sanaj. anini sa "patiko~uɾən ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u ina ako~u pirakat a o~unto~u" ** to~u ko~u miħəʦaan, tiko~uən no~u mita misaħiratəratəŋ to~u no~u ŋajŋaj piɾijaŋ to~u misatəkəɬ~ɮaj miko~uwan a to~uʡək a ʦisawarakaj ɬ~ɮəmak, o~u sapiɬ~ɮamaaw to~u so~uwaɾ no~u nijaħ maʦo~uɬ~ɮaħaj tirəŋ a saso~uwaɾən kimaɬ~ɮ. sarakataj so~uwaɾ no~u kitakit a o~unto~u *i **** miħəʦa, satapaŋan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ miʦaɾap, o~u kararimaan nipiʦaɾap a miko~uwan itini sapisaɾo~ufaw to~u sakasaso~uwaɾ, o~u so~uto~uko~u~u no~u kjo~u~uɬ~ɮən no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ mipatirəŋ i kasanijaro~uʡ to~u "so~uwaɾ no~u kitakit a pitiɾiɬ~ɮan", "so~uwaɾ no~u kitakit a pinanaman" sanaj pipasifanaʡan, maŋaɾaj minanam ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u tajwan to~u so~uwaɾ no~u kitakit (ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a so~uwaɾ) saan. **taŋasa i **** miħəʦa, o~u sapiħakitijaan to~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ kitakit "kapo~uɾo~uŋan ħaratəŋ no~u finawɾan" maʦəɾak to~u ko~u "niħo~un-ka o~unto~u", o~u ħaɾafinaj to~u ko~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj pasi to~usaaj so~uwaɾ satao~uʡ, misaʡiʦəɾ miʦikəro~uħ to~u kitakit a so~uwaɾ o~unto~u, o~urasaka ʦaaj ka ħaɾafin ko~u piʦikəro~uħ, maɾəko~u to~u ko~u paħəʦian no~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ. ɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦən misaʡo~usi, piko~uwanan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ saɾo~uŋan ira ko~u **% a tajwan tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u mafanaʡaj so~umo~uwaɾ to~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a so~uwaɾ, po~uɾo~uŋ no~u tajwan ira ko~u rafas no~u **** ɾaɾo~umaʡan ko~u "misano~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋaj to~u so~uwaɾ a ɾo~umaʡ", ʡaɾo~umanaj finawɾan mino~ukaj tajni ɾo~umaʡ, o~uno~u nijaħ to~u a so~uwaɾ ko~u niso~uwaɾan. maɾisəma ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u ina *i **** miħəʦa, mapiɬ~ɮaħ to~u ko~u ko~umintaŋ i ʦo~uŋko~u itija i, iko~ur miɾaɾiw tajni i tajwan, maɾa o~u niʦaɾapaj miko~uwan to~u tajwan, saʡajaw mafijo~uɾ ko~u pipaso~uwaɾ pisano~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a so~uwaɾ ko~u finawɾan no~u tajwan, kaɾo~ukəsan i, o~u piʦikəro~uħ no~u ko~umintaŋ a sifo~u pamatijaən to~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ piʦaɾap miko~uwan a satao~uʡ ko~u "paso~uwaɾ to~u no~u kitakit so~uwaɾ o~unto~u" (ko~uwapiŋ), paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u paɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u so~uwaɾ no~u ina a so~uwaɾ no~u kitakit a satao~uʡ. **ʦo~uŋko~u ko~umintaŋ mipaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u piəpəʦ to~u tajwan, itini i no~u ko~umintaŋ a piʦaɾap a miko~uwan, miɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan to~u piħamo~un miʦo~uwat to~u no~u kitakit a so~uwaɾ o~unto~u, maʦaɾap awiɬ~ɮ to~u **% ko~u pinanam, pasifanaʡ to~u kaəmaŋaj to~u so~uwaɾ, tiɾiɬ~ɮ, saminʦo~uʡis, ɾikisi no~u ʦo~uŋko~u a kamo~uk. ***o~u sakaranikajaw minanam no~u kaəmaŋaj paso~uwaɾ to~u no~u ko~uwapiŋ, saka pakinaɾi sato~u ko~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan mifo~uʡo~ut pipaso~uwaɾ no~u kaəmaŋaj to~u so~uwaɾ no~u ina a misano~u ko~uwapiŋ so~uwaɾ to~u sapitəfo~uʦ, tinako~u: sətiʡən, fakiŋən, pakato~umirəŋən, paʦaɾaj to~u paja no~u waʦo~u (paɾawaʦo~uən) a paja to~u "misano~u ko~uwapiŋ kako~u" sanaj ʦaɾaj a tiɾiɬ~ɮ. ****saki maɾasiŋsiaj ato~u finawɾan to~uja ħaw i, mipatirəŋ k sifo~u to~u pinanaman to~u ko~uwapiŋ a so~uwaɾ, pataŋiʦ to~u finawɾan papisano~u ko~uwapiŋ, saan paɾaʦəʦaj to~u so~uwaɾ, sakaŋaʡaj kasaso~uwaɾən sato~u, ano~u itira i ikako~uŋ, parato~uħaj ato~u ʡo~uripan to~u ro~umiʡaiʡaɬ~ɮ mifaʡo~ut misano~u pajraŋ, ŋaŋaj, jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u a so~uwaɾ. maɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u ko~u piəpəʦan kaʦəɾakan no~u ħana *i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ paɾasawaɬ~ɮan to~u piəpəʦ, aɬ~ɮiħajaj kasao~unto~u no~u sjakaj matija sa o~u naiko~uran no~u ʡo~uraɬ~ɮ masaɬ~ɮan to~u ko~u təfo~uʡ a maɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u, nano~ujaan sato~u mipaŋiħa to~u sifo~u paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u so~uwaɾ no~u ŋajŋaj ato~u ro~umaro~uma finaʦaɬ~ɮan ŋiħa a so~uwaɾ. **i **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, o~u ħakasi no~u tajwan ɬ~ɮajkako~u ʦi *io~u~u ro~uŋjo~u~u ato~u sinpo~u~unkisja ato~u ro~umaro~uma ħakasi kapo~uɾo~uŋan patirəŋ a ʦassi "kasənaŋan ŋajŋaj" sanaj. sarakataj a ʦassi paʡajawan "atəkakaj aʡiɾo~uʦan no~u wawa, faʡəɾo~uħaj fəɾiħ a ɾikisi" sanaj ko~u pato~uso~ukan, o~uja kakəriɬ~ɮan o~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj no~u ŋajŋaj, wənħo~u~uapo~u o~u kakəriɬ~ɮan ʦi ɾi jo~uŋɬ~ɮə ko~u pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋan tamɬ~ɮaw no~u ʦassi. ***ɾaɾo~umaʡan ira ko~u piparato~uħ, painiaj so~uwaɾ, kasaso~uwaɾan kaħira no~u niʦikəro~uħan to~u fo~uɾaɬ~ɮan no~u ʦassi, nanaj pakajni to~unini a ʦassi, mapaɾaɾ ko~u misaʡo~usiaj ko~u saɾo~uʡafaŋ no~u ŋajŋaj tamɬ~ɮaw, mapaɬ~ɮama pakatama to~u maħo~uɾaʦaj ** miħəʦa no~u ŋajŋaj. ****"kasənaŋan ŋajŋaj" ʦassi mitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ to~u nai katəɬ~ɮaɾan piəpəʦ sarakat miɬ~ɮəmak to~u ɾisin no~u "imin" sanaj ɾisin i tajpisiən itija, ira ko~u * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ * ko~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaja maso~uɾo~ut ko~u ** ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮ tamɬ~ɮaw to~u mikiħatijaaj; paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u to~uja miħəʦaan ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, miɬ~ɮəmak ko~u sinʦo~u~u imin pipajpajan to~u *** miħəʦaan no~u ŋajŋaj a ɾisin. o~u kaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u taɬ~ɮamaanaj ɾisin no~u ŋajŋaj, ira ko~u rafas ** a sakapo~ut maɾaʦəʦajaj faɾo~uʦo~uʡ to~u sapipatirəŋaw to~u "ŋajŋaj saɾo~uŋo~uʦ jo~ufajo~uf", paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u "patiko~uən ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u ina ako~u pirakat a o~unto~u", mitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ to~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u kitakitaj finawɾan no~u ŋajŋaj mirakat i ɾaɾan itija. maʦo~uɬ~ɮaħaj ko~u kato~umirəŋ pasaɬ~ɮak to~u ɾəto~uħ a ŋiħa *i **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, po~uɾo~uŋ no~u kasanijaro~uʡ no~u kitakit a ŋajŋaj masaʡo~upo~u itira i ko~u~uo~ufo~u piħaratəŋan, misaʡo~usi to~u "pitaʡo~uŋ ʦi so~u~un jat-sənan a tiɾiɬ~ɮ" to~uja ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, iko~ur o~u ʡaɾo~umanaj tamɬ~ɮaw ʦifaɾo~uʦo~uʡ to~u ħaratəŋan patəɾiən ko~u fo~uɬ~ɮawan marar ni so~u~un jat-sən patəɾi i paɾiɬ~ɮiŋ, ta misitapaŋ a mirakat itija. **o~uja mikiħatijaaj aɾaʦitamo~ukis sa a ro~umakat, miʡaŋʡaŋ: "ano~u maʡo~urip iħo~u ʦi so~u~un jat-sən i, ʦaaj ka ŋaʡaj ira paso~uwaɾ to~u no~u ŋajŋaj a so~uwaɾ." mikapo~ut k kaʦo~uɬ~ɮaħ no~u ɾaħa no~u ʡaɾo~umanaj, nano~ujaan sa pasajra i ɾifajin ato~u sinʦənjin ko~u rakat, pafəɾi to~u piɾijaŋ a tiɾiɬ~ɮ i ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj no~u sifo~u. ***ira ko~u to~uɾo~uaj saɾo~uŋo~uʦ no~u mirakataj, nanaj o~u paɾasawaɬ~ɮ no~u sifo~u to~u misatəkəɬ~ɮaj sako~uwan a piəpəʦan i, patirəŋ to~u no~u ŋajŋaj a so~uwak ato~u ro~uma a so~uwaɾ no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan i saɾaɾo~umaʡan no~u kitakit a maɾaɾən ko~u faʡəɾo~uħaj so~uwaɾ no~u paɾəŋawan: *****.ranikajən kao~u so~uwaɾ no~u ŋajŋaj a tiɾifi ato~u pakafanaʡ to~u mao~umaħaj rato~uħ to~u ro~umiʡamiʡaɬ~ɮ *.saɾo~ufən ko~u "sarikəʦ pato~uħ i tiɾifi" saka ** ɾijaɬ~ɮ to~u pato~uɾas təɾək a kasaɬ~ɮama to~u so~uwaɾ a pakajraan. *.patirəŋ to~u kasairaira no~u faʡəɾo~uħaj a so~uwaɾ satao~uʡ. *maħərək ko~uni a ɬ~ɮəmak, taɾifaħaɾan sa, o~u aɬ~ɮiħajaj paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮan a ɬ~ɮəmak, mikiħatijaaj paɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u sato~u "makiħar" no~u sifo~u, taɾaʦo~uwan maɾasawaɬ~ɮaj to~u ko~u piəpəʦan no~u tajwan, o~uno~u ko~umintaŋ ħo~u kitakit a saɾo~uʡafaŋ misijo~up ħo~u i kakarajan no~u səra no~u tajwan, kikaj no~u ko~umintaŋ ira ħo~u paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u a ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmak. **ħaratəŋ sa paso~uwaɾ ʦi *io~u~u ro~uŋjo~u~u ħakasi, "po~uɾo~uŋ no~u kitakit a ŋajŋaj rafasaj to~u *** ko~u mirakataj faso~u, pasiʡamis mikiħatija mirarakat, iʡajaw no~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ira to~u ko~u iməŋ miɾaɾaŋ to~u sakaəʦa mikiħatija, patajraən aʦa i pinəŋnəŋan to~u pinano~uwan, paɾiʡajaw paso~uwaɾ to~u o~u rarəpətəŋ saan. saka o~u mamikinapataj ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ ako~u itija, pataɾa to~u saɾijaw no~u *** piɾijaŋan maɬ~ɮo~ukaʡ a ʦimapataj. piɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u saɾo~uŋo~uʦ no~u so~uwaɾ, o~u kapo~uɾo~uŋan nisafaɾo~uʦo~uʡan to~u sakaɾaɾənaw *o~u sakaɾaħəʦi i patiko~uɾən ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u ina o~unto~u pirarakat o~u nai ŋajŋaj tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u pipaʡo~urip to~u sakataɬ~ɮamaan no~u ŋajŋaj a po~unka, miɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u sakaʦitariʡaŋ ato~u sakataɬ~ɮamaan sa mikiħatija, patiko~uɾən ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u ina o~unto~u pirarakat i o~u ŋajŋaj ko~u saʡajaw to~u pato~uso~ukan o~unto~u nai o~u ŋajŋaj. **o~unini a o~unto~u ʦaaj ka ɬ~ɮəŋan o~u ŋajŋaj tamɬ~ɮaw a so~uwaɾ ko~u makariʡaŋaj maəpəʦ no~u misatəkəɬ~ɮaj miko~uwan, to~uja to~uʡək miɬ~ɮajħiwaj to~unini a səra no~u tajwan to~u maɾəʦaɬ~ɮaj maəpəʦaj finawɾan no~u tajwan ato~u jinʦo~u~umin a finaʦaɬ~ɮan. itija to~ujaan, misaro~uʦo~uɬ~ɮ to~u ko~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u pasi sifo~u a miɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u sakaɬ~ɮama no~u nijaħ a so~uwaɾ. ***nai **** miħəʦaan itija, maʦakat ko~u minʦintaŋ sifo~u miʦikəro~uħ to~u saki kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u so~uwaɾ a o~unto~u, paʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮən ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u ina nanamən itini i pitiɾiɬ~ɮan. i **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, miko~uwan ʦi tsai iŋ-wən i, maħajɬ~ɮa ko~u "o~u rikəʦ to~u sakaʦəmaħaɬ~ɮ no~u so~uwaɾ no~u kitakit" pakajni i sarikəʦ mapaɬ~ɮama ko~u po~unka ato~u so~uwaɾ no~u tajwan, maɾaħəʦi paɾaɾən to~u so~uʡəɾinaj taɬ~ɮaso~uwaɾ. mikawitaj: ʦi wo~u~u sħəŋxian (sin tajwan ħəpin kikiŋkaj matajaɾaj) ==== mifaɾiʦaj: ʦi masao~u nikar ====
S.FORM: == Patikolen ko sowal no ina ako pirakat a onto == Taywan, roma a sowal Formosa, oya mataelifay to ko 400 mihecaan no likisi a cecay fangcalay kanatal, 'aloman ko papotalay misamawmaway sapicalapan mikowan sapipalekapotan to sowal manga'ay ko pikowan to Taywan o sanay. Anini sa "Patikolen ko sowal no ina ako pirakat a onto" 37 to ko mihecaan, tikoen no mita misahiraterateng to no Ngayngay piliyang to misatekeday mikowan a to'ek a cisawarakay demak, o sapidamaaw to sowal no niyah macodahay tireng a sasowalen kimad. Sarakatay sowal no kitakit a onto ​I 1895 miheca, satapangan no Dipong micalap, o kararimaan nipicalap a mikowan itini sapisalofaw to sakasasowal, o Sotoku no kyuden no Dipong mipatireng i kasaniyaro' to "sowal no kitakit a pitilidan", "sowal no kitakit a pinanaman" sanay pipasifana'an, mangalay minanam ko tamdaw no Taywan to sowal no kitakit (Dipong a sowal) saan. ​​Tangasa i 1937 miheca, o sapihakitiyaan to no Dipong kitakit "kapolongan harateng no finawlan" macelak to ko "Nihon-ka onto", o halafinay to ko citodongay pasi tosaay sowal satao', misa'icel micikeroh to kitakit a sowal onto, orasaka caay ka halafin ko picikeroh, maleko to ko pahecian no todong. Dotocen misa'osi, pikowanan no Dipong salongan ira ko 57% a taywan tamdaw ko mafana'ay somowal to no Dipong a sowal, polong no Taywan ira ko rafas no 9000 laloma'an ko "misano Dipongay to sowal a loma'", 'alomanay finawlan minokay tayni loma', ono niyah to a sowal ko nisowalan. Malisema ko sowal no ina ​I 1949 miheca, mapidah to ko komintang i Congko itiya i, ikor milaliw tayni i Taywan, mala o nicalapay mikowan to Taywan, sa'ayaw mafiyol ko pipasowal pisano Dipong a sowal ko finawlan no Taywan, kalokesan i, o picikeroh no komintang a sifo pamatiyaen to no Dipong picalap mikowan a satao' ko "pasowal to no kitakit sowal onto" (kowaping), padoedo palasawad to sowal no ina a sowal no kitakit a satao'. ​​Congko komintang mipalowad to piepec to Taywan, itini i no komintang a picalap a mikowan, milongoc to pitilidan to pihamon micowat to no kitakit a sowal onto, macalap awid to 30% ko pinanam, pasifana' to kaemangay to sowal, tilid, saminco'is, likisi no congko a kamok. ​​​O sakaranikayaw minanam no kaemangay pasowal to no kowaping, saka pakinali sato ko pitilidan mifo'ot pipasowal no kaemangay to sowal no ina a misano kowaping sowal to sapitefoc, tinako: seti'en, fakingen, pakatomirengen, pacalay to paya no Waco (palawacoen) a paya to "misano kowaping kako" sanay calay a tilid. ​​​​Saki malasingsiay ato finawlan toya haw i, mipatireng k sifo to pinanaman to kowaping a sowal, patangic to finawlan papisano kowaping, saan palacecay to sowal, sakanga'ay kasasowalen sato, ano itira i ikakong, paratohay ato 'oripan to romi'ai'ad mifa'ot misano Payrang, Ngangay, Yincuminco a sowal. Malasawad to ko piepecan kacelakan no hana ​I 1987 miheca 7 folad 15 romi'ad palasawadan to piepec, adihayay kasaonto no syakay matiya sa o naikoran no 'orad masadan to ko tefo' a madadoedo, nanoyaan sato mipangiha to sifo palowad to sowal no Ngayngay ato romaroma finacadan ngiha a sowal. ​​I 1987 miheca 10 folad 25 romi'ad, o hakasi no Taywan daykako ci Qiu Rongju ato sinpunkisya ato romaroma hakasi kapolongan patireng a cassi "kasenangan Ngayngay" sanay. Sarakatay a cassi pa'ayawan "Atekakay a'ilocan no wawa, fa'elohay felih a likisi" sanay ko patosokan, oya kakeridan o citodongay no Ngayngay, Wenhuapo o kakeridan ci Li Yongde ko patodongan tamdaw no cassi. ​​​Laloma'an ira ko piparatoh, painiay sowal, kasasowalan kahira no nicikerohan to foladan no cassi, nanay pakayni tonini a cassi, mapalal ko misa'osiay ko salo'afang no Ngayngay tamdaw, mapadama pakatama to maholacay 50 miheca no Ngayngay. ​​​​"kasenangan Ngayngay" cassi mitahidang to nai katedalan piepec sarakat midemak to lisin no "Imin" sanay lisin i Taypisien itiya, ira ko 4 romi'ad 3 ko dadaya masolot ko 10 'ofad tamdaw to mikihatiyaay; padoedo toya mihecaan 11 folad, midemak ko Sincu Imin pipaypayan to 200 mihecaan no Ngayngay a lisin. O kadadoedo tadamaanay lisin no Ngayngay, ira ko rafas 30 a sakapot malacecayay faloco' to sapipatirengaw to "Ngayngay salongoc yofayof", palowad to "Patikoen ko sowal no ina ako pirakat a onto", mitahidang to polong no kitakitay finawlan no Ngayngay mirakat i lalan itiya. Macodahay ko katomireng pasadak to letoh a ngiha ​I 1988 miheca 12 folad 28 romi'ad, polong no kasaniyaro' no kitakit a Ngayngay masa'opo itira i Kuofo piharatengan, misa'osi to "Pita'ong ci Sun Yat-senan a tilid" toya romi'ad, ikor o 'alomanay tamdaw cifaloco' to haratengan patelien ko fodawan marar ni Sun Yat-sen pateli i paliding, ta misitapang a mirakat itiya. ​​Oya mikihatiyaay alacitamokis sa a romakat, mi'ang'ang: "Ano ma'orip iho ci Sun Yat-sen i, caay ka nga'ay ira pasowal to no Ngayngay a sowal." Mikapot k kacodah no laha no 'alomanay, nanoyaan sa pasayra i Lifayin ato Sincenyin ko rakat, pafeli to piliyang a tilid i citodongay no sifo. ​​​Ira ko toloay salongoc no mirakatay, nanay o palasawad no sifo to misatekeday sakowan a piepecan i, patireng to no Ngayngay a sowak ato roma a sowal no finacadan i salaloma'an no kitakit a malalen ko fa'elohay sowal no palengawan: ​​​​1.Ranikayen kao sowal no Ngayngay a tilifi ato pakafana' to maomahay ratoh to romi'ami'ad 2.Salofen ko "sarikec patoh i tilifi" saka 20 liyad to patolas telek a kasadama to sowal a pakayraan. 3.Patireng to kasairaira no fa'elohay a sowal satao'. ​Maherek koni a demak, talifahalan sa, o adihayay palowadan a demak, mikihatiyaay padadoedo sato "makihar" no sifo, talacowan malasawaday to ko piepecan no Taywan, ono komintang ho kitakit a salo'afang misiyop ho i kakarayan no sera no Taywan, kikay no komintang ira ho padoedo a dademak. ​​Harateng sa pasowal ci Qiu Rongju hakasi, "polong no kitakit a ngayngay rafasay to 200 ko mirakatay faso, pasi'amis mikihatiya mirarakat, i'ayaw no romi'ad ira to ko imeng milalang to sakaeca mikihatiya, patayraen aca i pinengnengan to pinanowan, pali'ayaw pasowal to o rarepeteng saan. saka o mamikinapatay ko faloco' ako itiya, patala to saliyaw no 228 piliyangan madoka' a cimapatay. Pilongoc to salongoc no sowal, o kapolongan nisafaloco'an to sakalalenaw ​O sakalaheci i patikolen ko sowal no ina onto pirarakat o nai Ngayngay tamdaw ko pipa'orip to sakatadamaan no Ngayngay a ponka, milongoc to sakacitari'ang ato sakatadamaan sa mikihatiya, patikolen ko sowal no ina onto pirarakat i o Ngayngay ko sa'ayaw to patosokan onto nai o Ngayngay. ​​Onini a onto caay ka dengan o Ngayngay tamdaw a sowal ko makari'angay maepec no misatekeday mikowan, toya to'ek midayhiway tonini a sera no Taywan to malecaday maepecay finawlan no Taywan ato yincumin a finacadan. Itiya toyaan, misarocod to ko yincuminco pasi sifo a milongoc to sakadama no niyah a sowal. ​​​Nai 2000 mihecaan itiya, macakat ko Mincintang sifo micikeroh to saki kasafinacadan palowad to sowal a onto, pacomoden ko sowal no ina nanamen itini i pitilidan. I 2018 miheca 12 folad 25 romi'ad, mikowan ci Tsai Ing-wen i, mahayda ko "O rikec to sakacemahad no sowal no kitakit" pakayni i sarikec mapadama ko ponka ato sowal no Taywan, malaheci palalen to so'elinay tadasowal. Mikawitay: ci Wu Shengxian (Sin Taywan hepin kikingkay matayalay) ==== Mifalicay: ci Masao Nikar ====
S.PHON: == patiko~uɾən ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u ina ako~u pirakat a o~unto~u == tajwan, ro~uma a so~uwaɾ fo~urmo~usa, o~uja mataəɾifaj to~u ko~u *** miħəʦaan no~u ɾikisi a ʦəʦaj faŋʦaɾaj kanataɾ, ʡaɾo~uman ko~u papo~utaɾaj misamawmawaj sapiʦaɾapan miko~uwan sapipaɾəkapo~utan to~u so~uwaɾ maŋaʡaj ko~u piko~uwan to~u tajwan o~u sanaj. anini sa "patiko~uɾən ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u ina ako~u pirakat a o~unto~u" ** to~u ko~u miħəʦaan, tiko~uən no~u mita misaħiratəratəŋ to~u no~u ŋajŋaj piɾijaŋ to~u misatəkəɬ~ɮaj miko~uwan a to~uʡək a ʦisawarakaj ɬ~ɮəmak, o~u sapiɬ~ɮamaaw to~u so~uwaɾ no~u nijaħ maʦo~uɬ~ɮaħaj tirəŋ a saso~uwaɾən kimaɬ~ɮ. sarakataj so~uwaɾ no~u kitakit a o~unto~u *i **** miħəʦa, satapaŋan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ miʦaɾap, o~u kararimaan nipiʦaɾap a miko~uwan itini sapisaɾo~ufaw to~u sakasaso~uwaɾ, o~u so~uto~uko~u~u no~u kjo~u~uɬ~ɮən no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ mipatirəŋ i kasanijaro~uʡ to~u "so~uwaɾ no~u kitakit a pitiɾiɬ~ɮan", "so~uwaɾ no~u kitakit a pinanaman" sanaj pipasifanaʡan, maŋaɾaj minanam ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u tajwan to~u so~uwaɾ no~u kitakit (ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a so~uwaɾ) saan. **taŋasa i **** miħəʦa, o~u sapiħakitijaan to~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ kitakit "kapo~uɾo~uŋan ħaratəŋ no~u finawɾan" maʦəɾak to~u ko~u "niħo~un-ka o~unto~u", o~u ħaɾafinaj to~u ko~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj pasi to~usaaj so~uwaɾ satao~uʡ, misaʡiʦəɾ miʦikəro~uħ to~u kitakit a so~uwaɾ o~unto~u, o~urasaka ʦaaj ka ħaɾafin ko~u piʦikəro~uħ, maɾəko~u to~u ko~u paħəʦian no~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ. ɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦən misaʡo~usi, piko~uwanan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ saɾo~uŋan ira ko~u **% a tajwan tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u mafanaʡaj so~umo~uwaɾ to~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a so~uwaɾ, po~uɾo~uŋ no~u tajwan ira ko~u rafas no~u **** ɾaɾo~umaʡan ko~u "misano~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋaj to~u so~uwaɾ a ɾo~umaʡ", ʡaɾo~umanaj finawɾan mino~ukaj tajni ɾo~umaʡ, o~uno~u nijaħ to~u a so~uwaɾ ko~u niso~uwaɾan. maɾisəma ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u ina *i **** miħəʦa, mapiɬ~ɮaħ to~u ko~u ko~umintaŋ i ʦo~uŋko~u itija i, iko~ur miɾaɾiw tajni i tajwan, maɾa o~u niʦaɾapaj miko~uwan to~u tajwan, saʡajaw mafijo~uɾ ko~u pipaso~uwaɾ pisano~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a so~uwaɾ ko~u finawɾan no~u tajwan, kaɾo~ukəsan i, o~u piʦikəro~uħ no~u ko~umintaŋ a sifo~u pamatijaən to~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ piʦaɾap miko~uwan a satao~uʡ ko~u "paso~uwaɾ to~u no~u kitakit so~uwaɾ o~unto~u" (ko~uwapiŋ), paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u paɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u so~uwaɾ no~u ina a so~uwaɾ no~u kitakit a satao~uʡ. **ʦo~uŋko~u ko~umintaŋ mipaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u piəpəʦ to~u tajwan, itini i no~u ko~umintaŋ a piʦaɾap a miko~uwan, miɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan to~u piħamo~un miʦo~uwat to~u no~u kitakit a so~uwaɾ o~unto~u, maʦaɾap awiɬ~ɮ to~u **% ko~u pinanam, pasifanaʡ to~u kaəmaŋaj to~u so~uwaɾ, tiɾiɬ~ɮ, saminʦo~uʡis, ɾikisi no~u ʦo~uŋko~u a kamo~uk. ***o~u sakaranikajaw minanam no~u kaəmaŋaj paso~uwaɾ to~u no~u ko~uwapiŋ, saka pakinaɾi sato~u ko~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan mifo~uʡo~ut pipaso~uwaɾ no~u kaəmaŋaj to~u so~uwaɾ no~u ina a misano~u ko~uwapiŋ so~uwaɾ to~u sapitəfo~uʦ, tinako~u: sətiʡən, fakiŋən, pakato~umirəŋən, paʦaɾaj to~u paja no~u waʦo~u (paɾawaʦo~uən) a paja to~u "misano~u ko~uwapiŋ kako~u" sanaj ʦaɾaj a tiɾiɬ~ɮ. ****saki maɾasiŋsiaj ato~u finawɾan to~uja ħaw i, mipatirəŋ k sifo~u to~u pinanaman to~u ko~uwapiŋ a so~uwaɾ, pataŋiʦ to~u finawɾan papisano~u ko~uwapiŋ, saan paɾaʦəʦaj to~u so~uwaɾ, sakaŋaʡaj kasaso~uwaɾən sato~u, ano~u itira i ikako~uŋ, parato~uħaj ato~u ʡo~uripan to~u ro~umiʡaiʡaɬ~ɮ mifaʡo~ut misano~u pajraŋ, ŋaŋaj, jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u a so~uwaɾ. maɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u ko~u piəpəʦan kaʦəɾakan no~u ħana *i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ paɾasawaɬ~ɮan to~u piəpəʦ, aɬ~ɮiħajaj kasao~unto~u no~u sjakaj matija sa o~u naiko~uran no~u ʡo~uraɬ~ɮ masaɬ~ɮan to~u ko~u təfo~uʡ a maɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u, nano~ujaan sato~u mipaŋiħa to~u sifo~u paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u so~uwaɾ no~u ŋajŋaj ato~u ro~umaro~uma finaʦaɬ~ɮan ŋiħa a so~uwaɾ. **i **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, o~u ħakasi no~u tajwan ɬ~ɮajkako~u ʦi *io~u~u ro~uŋjo~u~u ato~u sinpo~u~unkisja ato~u ro~umaro~uma ħakasi kapo~uɾo~uŋan patirəŋ a ʦassi "kasənaŋan ŋajŋaj" sanaj. sarakataj a ʦassi paʡajawan "atəkakaj aʡiɾo~uʦan no~u wawa, faʡəɾo~uħaj fəɾiħ a ɾikisi" sanaj ko~u pato~uso~ukan, o~uja kakəriɬ~ɮan o~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj no~u ŋajŋaj, wənħo~u~uapo~u o~u kakəriɬ~ɮan ʦi ɾi jo~uŋɬ~ɮə ko~u pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋan tamɬ~ɮaw no~u ʦassi. ***ɾaɾo~umaʡan ira ko~u piparato~uħ, painiaj so~uwaɾ, kasaso~uwaɾan kaħira no~u niʦikəro~uħan to~u fo~uɾaɬ~ɮan no~u ʦassi, nanaj pakajni to~unini a ʦassi, mapaɾaɾ ko~u misaʡo~usiaj ko~u saɾo~uʡafaŋ no~u ŋajŋaj tamɬ~ɮaw, mapaɬ~ɮama pakatama to~u maħo~uɾaʦaj ** miħəʦa no~u ŋajŋaj. ****"kasənaŋan ŋajŋaj" ʦassi mitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ to~u nai katəɬ~ɮaɾan piəpəʦ sarakat miɬ~ɮəmak to~u ɾisin no~u "imin" sanaj ɾisin i tajpisiən itija, ira ko~u * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ * ko~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaja maso~uɾo~ut ko~u ** ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮ tamɬ~ɮaw to~u mikiħatijaaj; paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u to~uja miħəʦaan ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, miɬ~ɮəmak ko~u sinʦo~u~u imin pipajpajan to~u *** miħəʦaan no~u ŋajŋaj a ɾisin. o~u kaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u taɬ~ɮamaanaj ɾisin no~u ŋajŋaj, ira ko~u rafas ** a sakapo~ut maɾaʦəʦajaj faɾo~uʦo~uʡ to~u sapipatirəŋaw to~u "ŋajŋaj saɾo~uŋo~uʦ jo~ufajo~uf", paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u "patiko~uən ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u ina ako~u pirakat a o~unto~u", mitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ to~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u kitakitaj finawɾan no~u ŋajŋaj mirakat i ɾaɾan itija. maʦo~uɬ~ɮaħaj ko~u kato~umirəŋ pasaɬ~ɮak to~u ɾəto~uħ a ŋiħa *i **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, po~uɾo~uŋ no~u kasanijaro~uʡ no~u kitakit a ŋajŋaj masaʡo~upo~u itira i ko~u~uo~ufo~u piħaratəŋan, misaʡo~usi to~u "pitaʡo~uŋ ʦi so~u~un jat-sənan a tiɾiɬ~ɮ" to~uja ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, iko~ur o~u ʡaɾo~umanaj tamɬ~ɮaw ʦifaɾo~uʦo~uʡ to~u ħaratəŋan patəɾiən ko~u fo~uɬ~ɮawan marar ni so~u~un jat-sən patəɾi i paɾiɬ~ɮiŋ, ta misitapaŋ a mirakat itija. **o~uja mikiħatijaaj aɾaʦitamo~ukis sa a ro~umakat, miʡaŋʡaŋ: "ano~u maʡo~urip iħo~u ʦi so~u~un jat-sən i, ʦaaj ka ŋaʡaj ira paso~uwaɾ to~u no~u ŋajŋaj a so~uwaɾ." mikapo~ut k kaʦo~uɬ~ɮaħ no~u ɾaħa no~u ʡaɾo~umanaj, nano~ujaan sa pasajra i ɾifajin ato~u sinʦənjin ko~u rakat, pafəɾi to~u piɾijaŋ a tiɾiɬ~ɮ i ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj no~u sifo~u. ***ira ko~u to~uɾo~uaj saɾo~uŋo~uʦ no~u mirakataj, nanaj o~u paɾasawaɬ~ɮ no~u sifo~u to~u misatəkəɬ~ɮaj sako~uwan a piəpəʦan i, patirəŋ to~u no~u ŋajŋaj a so~uwak ato~u ro~uma a so~uwaɾ no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan i saɾaɾo~umaʡan no~u kitakit a maɾaɾən ko~u faʡəɾo~uħaj so~uwaɾ no~u paɾəŋawan: *****.ranikajən kao~u so~uwaɾ no~u ŋajŋaj a tiɾifi ato~u pakafanaʡ to~u mao~umaħaj rato~uħ to~u ro~umiʡamiʡaɬ~ɮ *.saɾo~ufən ko~u "sarikəʦ pato~uħ i tiɾifi" saka ** ɾijaɬ~ɮ to~u pato~uɾas təɾək a kasaɬ~ɮama to~u so~uwaɾ a pakajraan. *.patirəŋ to~u kasairaira no~u faʡəɾo~uħaj a so~uwaɾ satao~uʡ. *maħərək ko~uni a ɬ~ɮəmak, taɾifaħaɾan sa, o~u aɬ~ɮiħajaj paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮan a ɬ~ɮəmak, mikiħatijaaj paɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u sato~u "makiħar" no~u sifo~u, taɾaʦo~uwan maɾasawaɬ~ɮaj to~u ko~u piəpəʦan no~u tajwan, o~uno~u ko~umintaŋ ħo~u kitakit a saɾo~uʡafaŋ misijo~up ħo~u i kakarajan no~u səra no~u tajwan, kikaj no~u ko~umintaŋ ira ħo~u paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u a ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmak. **ħaratəŋ sa paso~uwaɾ ʦi *io~u~u ro~uŋjo~u~u ħakasi, "po~uɾo~uŋ no~u kitakit a ŋajŋaj rafasaj to~u *** ko~u mirakataj faso~u, pasiʡamis mikiħatija mirarakat, iʡajaw no~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ira to~u ko~u iməŋ miɾaɾaŋ to~u sakaəʦa mikiħatija, patajraən aʦa i pinəŋnəŋan to~u pinano~uwan, paɾiʡajaw paso~uwaɾ to~u o~u rarəpətəŋ saan. saka o~u mamikinapataj ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ ako~u itija, pataɾa to~u saɾijaw no~u *** piɾijaŋan maɬ~ɮo~ukaʡ a ʦimapataj. piɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u saɾo~uŋo~uʦ no~u so~uwaɾ, o~u kapo~uɾo~uŋan nisafaɾo~uʦo~uʡan to~u sakaɾaɾənaw *o~u sakaɾaħəʦi i patiko~uɾən ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u ina o~unto~u pirarakat o~u nai ŋajŋaj tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u pipaʡo~urip to~u sakataɬ~ɮamaan no~u ŋajŋaj a po~unka, miɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u sakaʦitariʡaŋ ato~u sakataɬ~ɮamaan sa mikiħatija, patiko~uɾən ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u ina o~unto~u pirarakat i o~u ŋajŋaj ko~u saʡajaw to~u pato~uso~ukan o~unto~u nai o~u ŋajŋaj. **o~unini a o~unto~u ʦaaj ka ɬ~ɮəŋan o~u ŋajŋaj tamɬ~ɮaw a so~uwaɾ ko~u makariʡaŋaj maəpəʦ no~u misatəkəɬ~ɮaj miko~uwan, to~uja to~uʡək miɬ~ɮajħiwaj to~unini a səra no~u tajwan to~u maɾəʦaɬ~ɮaj maəpəʦaj finawɾan no~u tajwan ato~u jinʦo~u~umin a finaʦaɬ~ɮan. itija to~ujaan, misaro~uʦo~uɬ~ɮ to~u ko~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u pasi sifo~u a miɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u sakaɬ~ɮama no~u nijaħ a so~uwaɾ. ***nai **** miħəʦaan itija, maʦakat ko~u minʦintaŋ sifo~u miʦikəro~uħ to~u saki kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u so~uwaɾ a o~unto~u, paʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮən ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u ina nanamən itini i pitiɾiɬ~ɮan. i **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, miko~uwan ʦi tsai iŋ-wən i, maħajɬ~ɮa ko~u "o~u rikəʦ to~u sakaʦəmaħaɬ~ɮ no~u so~uwaɾ no~u kitakit" pakajni i sarikəʦ mapaɬ~ɮama ko~u po~unka ato~u so~uwaɾ no~u tajwan, maɾaħəʦi paɾaɾən to~u so~uʡəɾinaj taɬ~ɮaso~uwaɾ. mikawitaj: ʦi wo~u~u sħəŋxian (sin tajwan ħəpin kikiŋkaj matajaɾaj) ==== mifaɾiʦaj: ʦi masao~u nikar ====
